title: magnolia auricularis
intro: Magnolia auricularis, also known as the ear drop magnolia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits of Magnolia auricularis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Magnolia auricularis can be consumed as a tea, used in tinctures, or applied topically as an essential oil to harness its medicinal properties.
